title: Damage zone
description: Set a zone, where players will be getting damage
body:
This small mod will add an invisible and intangible block that will cause quite a lot of damage to all players who enter it. This block can be obtained only in the creative, in the operator's tab, or by command


```
/give @s damage_zone:damage_zone
```

The mod will be useful for those who create maps for minecraft.


You can use this mod anywhere for free, but don't present it as your work.
